title: Udaipur, Rajasthan — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Udaipur, Rajasthan: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Udaipur is a city in Rajasthan with a population of 600,000. The City of Lakes, one of India’s most romantic destinations, known for its stunning palaces, lake palaces, and Rajput architecture.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
